Title: Onyx the Fortuitous and the Talisman of Souls
FullTitle: Onyx the Fortuitous and the Talisman of Souls
SortTitle: Onyx the Fortuitous and the Talisman of Souls
Plot: Onyx joins a group of fellow occultists to attend a dark ritual at the mansion of their idol, Bartok. Suspecting Bartok’s nefarious intentions, Onyx is suddenly immersed in a world of monsters, mystery, and mayhem.
Tagline: Demons. Ghouls. Tiny wines. Onyx is in for one hell of a weekend.
